title: Ice Sword datapack
description: This is a datapack that adds a sick Ice Sword
body:
# Ice Sword datapack
This is just a datapack that adds a nice Ice Sword, no biggie!
## Features
- well... there's only one feature, the sword.
## How to use
1. Install it to your world by putting the zip file in the datapacks folder of your world
2. Install the texture pack by putting it in your texture pack folder 
3. Run the command /function fun:ice_sword
4. Have fun!
## Texture pack
Click [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ice-sword-textures) for the texture pack.
If you download the texture pack you can get the sword without all the fancy stuff with this command: /give @s netherite_sword[custom_model_data=1]
## External sources
These are just the people that helped me.
- Thank you to [abdouahabch7](https://modrinth.com/user/abdouahabch7) for making the Glacier Edge texture pack, from which I stole the sword texture.
- And thanks to the [wasdbuildteam](https://wasdbuildteam.website/) for teaching me how to make a texture pack!
- And finally thank you for your support!
## Notes
- I do plan on adding a recipe for this sword, but later.
- You can add this to an existing world without concern
